projects.title: Grapes Real Estate Platform
projects.description: A modern real estate platform for listing, searching, and managing properties with an integrated admin system.

caseStudy.problem: Real estate agencies required a centralized system to manage property listings, agents, and client inquiries.
caseStudy.solution: Developed a scalable real estate platform allowing agents to manage listings, track inquiries, and showcase properties with advanced filters.
caseStudy.result: Improved listing management efficiency and enhanced the property discovery experience for customers.

projects.title: Astutelook Corporate Platform
projects.description: Corporate website and service platform for an IT consulting and product engineering company.

caseStudy.problem: The company needed a modern digital presence to showcase services and generate business leads.
caseStudy.solution: Designed and built a responsive corporate platform with service pages, portfolio sections, and lead capture functionality.
caseStudy.result: Increased online visibility and improved client acquisition through the website.

projects.title: Prasiddh Travels
projects.description: Travel booking and destination showcase platform for a travel services company.

caseStudy.problem: Travel agencies required a platform to present tour packages and manage customer inquiries.
caseStudy.solution: Built a responsive travel platform displaying packages, itineraries, and booking inquiry systems.
caseStudy.result: Enabled the travel company to present packages online and capture booking inquiries efficiently.

projects.title: Shini Fashion
projects.description: An online fashion e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart system, and order management.

caseStudy.problem: Fashion businesses required a scalable online platform to sell products directly to customers.
caseStudy.solution: Developed an e-commerce platform with product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, and order management.
caseStudy.result: Enabled online product sales and streamlined order processing.

projects.title: DesignShilp
projects.description: Portfolio and business website for an interior design firm showcasing projects and services.

caseStudy.problem: Interior design firms needed a professional website to display their portfolio and attract clients.
caseStudy.solution: Built a modern portfolio website with project galleries and service pages.
caseStudy.result: Improved brand credibility and client inquiries.

projects.title: Anjaneya Real Estate
projects.description: Real estate listing and property showcase platform for property developers.

caseStudy.problem: Property developers needed a platform to showcase available properties and collect buyer inquiries.
caseStudy.solution: Built a property listing platform with detailed property pages and lead capture forms.
caseStudy.result: Increased buyer inquiries and simplified property promotion.

projects.title: Cafe Demo Website
projects.description: A demo restaurant website showcasing menu, location, and reservation features.

caseStudy.problem: Restaurants require simple websites to present menus and attract customers.
caseStudy.solution: Created a responsive cafe website with menu display and contact information.
caseStudy.result: Improved online presence for small restaurant businesses.

projects.title: Nike Landing Page
projects.description: A modern landing page inspired by Nike showcasing responsive UI design.

caseStudy.problem: Landing pages require visually engaging design to capture user attention.
caseStudy.solution: Built a responsive landing page focused on modern UI/UX design principles.
caseStudy.result: Demonstrates modern UI design and frontend development capabilities.

projects.title: Dentist Clinic Website
projects.description: A professional website for dental clinics featuring services and appointment booking.

caseStudy.problem: Dental clinics require websites to inform patients about services and schedule appointments.
caseStudy.solution: Developed a responsive clinic website with appointment request forms.
caseStudy.result: Improved online visibility and patient engagement.
